query: Audit our host scans, CSPM, security.txt, penetration-test records, and vulnerability register against Singapore Government ST-1 through ST-5.
Set up pre-launch security testing for a public agency service: authenticated host scans, continuous cloud posture checks, RFC 9116 disclosure, independent VAPT, and remediation SLAs.
Our team counts Dependabot and CodeQL as host vulnerability assessment. Explain the SD versus ST boundary and configure the scan type and cadence from the SSP.
Fix a security.txt file served at /security.txt with an expired Expires field and no reporting link, and map the result to ST-3.
The last pen test was three years ago, performed by our developers with no scope, report, or retest. Produce a compliant independent VAPT plan for the next launch.
Review vulnerability-register.csv for overdue Critical and High findings, informal risk acceptance, missing compensating controls, and CISA KEV items left at low priority.
Create a consolidated vulnerability-management SOP for findings from host scans, CSPM, VAPT, disclosures, SAST, and SCA, preserving the correct control-family boundaries.
Our SSP leaves the vulnerability scan type blank but sets a 14-day cadence. Flag the parameter gap rather than choosing one, and design the programme around the supplied cadence.
Plan a remediation retest after VAPT, including evidence of closure, scope for changed components, residual-risk approval, and tracking against ST-5 deadlines.
Prepare an audit-ready ST control matrix with owners, tools, frequencies, evidence locations, open findings, risk acceptances, and next test dates.
Add CodeQL, dependency scanning, secret scanning, SBOM generation, and signed releases to GitHub Actions.
Fix the SQL injection bug in the login route of my personal Express side project.
Configure VPC segmentation, WAF, DDoS protection, IDS, VPN access, and firewall alerts.
Set up immutable backups, recovery tests, a disaster recovery plan, and annual business continuity exercises.
Review IAM accounts, MFA, access reviews, credential rotation, SSO, and endpoint posture.
Run npm audit once and tell me whether my hobby project's dependencies have known vulnerabilities.
Harden a container image and Kubernetes workload with digest pins, non-root execution, scanning, private registry, and Falco.
Design cryptographic key rotation, HSM storage, and envelope encryption under CK-1 through CK-4.
Audit data residency, encryption, GCC tenancy, storage sanitisation, DLP, and input classification disclosure.
Choose the applicable SSP profile and list the control levels before the project begins its security implementation.
